records.question: Which electronics associated with Denesik and Sons Party have a service type of Check and service details exactly Satisfied on 2016-08-04 00:25:55 at location 94425 Nellie Kn?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
JOIN organizations ON things.organization_id = organizations.organization_id
JOIN timed_locations_of_things ON things.thing_id = timed_locations_of_things.thing_id
WHERE timed_locations_of_things.location_code = '94425 Nellie Kn' AND organizations.organization_details = 'Denesik and Sons Party' AND things.service_type_code = 'Check' AND things.service_details = 'Satisfied' AND timed_locations_of_things.date_and_time = '2016-08-04 00:25:55' AND things.type_of_thing_code = 'Electronics'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.thing_id FROM Things AS T1 INNER JOIN Organizations AS T2 ON T1.organization_id = T2.organization_id INNER JOIN Timed_Locations_of_Things AS T3 ON T1.thing_id = T3.thing_id WHERE T2.organization_details = 'Denesik and Sons Party' AND T1.service_type_code = 'Check' AND T1.service_details = 'Satisfied' AND T1.Type_of_Thing_Code = 'electronics' AND T3.Date_and_Time = '2016-08-04 00:25:55' AND T3.Location_Code = '94425 Nellie Kn'

records.question: Which furniture items have a service type exactly Cleanning and belong to organizations that offer Cleanning services?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
JOIN organizations ON things.organization_id = organizations.organization_id
JOIN services ON organizations.organization_id = services.organization_id
WHERE things.type_of_thing_code = 'Furniture' AND things.service_type_code = 'Cleanning' AND services.service_type_code = 'Cleanning'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.thing_id FROM Things AS T1 INNER JOIN Services AS T2 ON T1.organization_id = T2.organization_id WHERE T1.service_type_code = 'Cleanning' AND T2.service_type_code = 'Cleanning'

records.question: Which things are associated with organizations that provide services where the service type code is Moving Out?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
JOIN organizations ON things.organization_id = organizations.organization_id
JOIN services ON organizations.organization_id = services.organization_id
WHERE services.service_type_code = 'Moving Out'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.thing_id FROM Things AS T1 INNER JOIN Organizations AS T2 ON T1.organization_id = T2.organization_id INNER JOIN Services AS T3 ON T2.organization_id = T3.organization_id WHERE T3.service_type_code = 'Moving Out'

records.question: Which Furniture items have service details exactly Satisfied and have had status updates on or after 2017-07-03 02:22:12?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
JOIN timed_status_of_things ON things.thing_id = timed_status_of_things.thing_id
JOIN timed_locations_of_things ON things.thing_id = timed_locations_of_things.thing_id
WHERE things.type_of_thing_code = 'Furniture' AND things.service_details = 'Satisfied' AND timed_status_of_things.date_and_date >= '2017-07-03 02:22:12'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.thing_id FROM Things AS T1 INNER JOIN Timed_Status_of_Things AS T2 ON T1.thing_id = T2.thing_id WHERE T1.Type_of_Thing_Code = 'Furniture' AND T1.service_details = 'Satisfied' AND T2.Date_and_Date >= '2017-07-03 02:22:12'

records.question: Which things are located exactly at 064 Charles Mou?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
JOIN organizations ON things.organization_id = organizations.organization_id
JOIN timed_locations_of_things ON things.thing_id = timed_locations_of_things.thing_id
WHERE timed_locations_of_things.location_code = '064 Charles Mou'
records.pred_sql: SELECT thing_id FROM Timed_Locations_of_Things WHERE Location_Code = '064 Charles Mou'

records.question: Which furniture items have service type Check with service details Unsatisfied, and belong to the organization Denesik and Sons Party?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
JOIN organizations ON things.organization_id = organizations.organization_id
WHERE things.service_type_code = 'Check' AND things.service_details = 'Unsatisfied' AND organizations.organization_details = 'Denesik and Sons Party' AND things.type_of_thing_code = 'Furniture'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.thing_id FROM Things AS T1 INNER JOIN Organizations AS T2 ON T1.organization_id = T2.organization_id WHERE T1.Type_of_Thing_Code = 'furniture items' AND T1.service_type_code = 'Check' AND T1.service_details = 'Unsatisfied' AND T2.organization_details = 'Denesik and Sons Party'

records.question: Which electronics from Denesik and Sons Party have a Check service marked as Satisfied while their Pay bills service is Unsatisfied?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
JOIN organizations ON things.organization_id = organizations.organization_id
JOIN services ON organizations.organization_id = services.organization_id
WHERE things.service_details = 'Satisfied' AND things.service_type_code = 'Check' AND services.service_details = 'Unsatisfied' AND services.service_type_code = 'Pay bills' AND things.type_of_thing_code = 'Electronics' AND organizations.organization_details = 'Denesik and Sons Party'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT T.thing_id
FROM Things AS T
JOIN Organizations AS O
  ON T.organization_id = O.organization_id
WHERE
  T.Type_of_Thing_Code = 'electronics'
  AND O.organization_details = 'Denesik and Sons Party'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Timed_Status_of_Things AS TS1
    WHERE
      TS1.thing_id = T.thing_id
      AND TS1.Status_of_Thing_Code LIKE '%Check%'
      AND TS1.Status_of_Thing_Code LIKE '%Satisfied%'
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Timed_Status_of_Things AS TS2
    WHERE
      TS2.thing_id = T.thing_id
      AND TS2.Status_of_Thing_Code LIKE '%Pay bills%'
      AND TS2.Status_of_Thing_Code LIKE '%Unsatisfied%'
  )
